author: lOrm
content: Fixed: refresh_tools now gates on capabilities.tools before issuing tools/list. Added public accessor McpServer::has_tools_capability(&self) -> bool (const fn, mirrors has_resources). When the gate is false, refresh_tools logs a debug message and returns Ok(()) without touching the wire, matching CC fetchToolsForClient (client.ts:1748-1751). Three tests: positive-path (capability present → RPC issued, tools list populated), negative-path (capability absent → wire call skipped, tripwire reply unconsumed, tools list empty), and the accessor's two-state contract under both handshake shapes. All 1666 lib tests pass, cargo clippy --all-targets --all-features -D warnings exits 0, no #[allow]/#[ignore]/clippy.toml.
